---
title: "AI Usage Log"
---

# AI Usage Log

::: {.prose}
Most AI assistance in this project was provided by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Anthropic). Additional small code error debugging was done with ChatGPT GPT-5.3-mini model (OpenAI).

| # | Task |
|---|---|
| 1 | Project idea refinement and brainstorming | 
| 2 | Quarto style customization |
| 3 | Code syntax help and error debugging |
| 4 | BibTex resources formatting |

:::
